## 👋 Welcome to GridOS Discussions

GridOS is an open-source AI spreadsheet with a deterministic Python kernel underneath. If you're here to build on it, use it, or just watch it happen, you're in the right place.

### Where things go

- **💡 Ideas** — feature requests, "it would be cool if…", UX thoughts. Kicked up to Issues once they have a concrete scope.
- **🙋 Q&A** — stuck on setup, plugin authoring, Supabase, SaaS deploy? Ask here. I read every thread.
- **🎨 Show and tell** — a workbook you built, a plugin you shipped, a weird financial model that makes Excel cry. Drop a screenshot.
- **📣 Announcements** — I post here when a big feature ships or a breaking change is incoming.

### Not for here

- **🐛 Bugs** — file an [Issue](https://github.com/shreydevkar/gridos/issues/new?template=bug_report.md) instead. Bug reports are easier to triage with the template's repro steps.
- **🔐 Security vulnerabilities** — email `gridosdev@gmail.com`, don't post publicly. See [SECURITY.md](https://github.com/shreydevkar/gridos/blob/master/SECURITY.md).

### What is GridOS?

Agentic spreadsheet — natural-language prompts become deterministic cell writes via a preview-first guardrail. Multi-provider LLMs (Gemini / Claude / Groq / OpenRouter), plugin system for custom formulas + agents + models, live collab in the SaaS tier. Repo: [github.com/shreydevkar/gridos](https://github.com/shreydevkar/gridos) · Live: [gridos.onrender.com](https://gridos.onrender.com) · Docs: [gridos.mintlify.app](https://gridos.mintlify.app).

To start: reply to this post with a one-liner about what you're building or hoping to build.
